instruction:
Summarise the following contract section. Return a JSON object with keys: parties, effective_date, key_obligations, termination_conditions, governing_law.

Contract text:
INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT DISCLAIMER: This document is a general template provided for educational purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice. Users should consult with a qualified legal professional before using this or any legal document. This Independent Contractor Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of [Date] (the "Effective Date"), by and between: [Client Name], a [Company Type, e.g., Corporation], with its principal place of business at [Address] (the "Client"), and [Contractor Name], an individual/business with a principal place of business at [Address] (the "Contractor"). 1. SERVICES TO BE PERFORMED Contractor agrees to perform the following services (the "Services"): [Detailed description of legal-review SLM development, fine-tuning, and deployment tasks]. Contractor shall determine the manner and means by which the Services are performed, subject to the requirement that the Services shall be performed in a professional and workmanlike manner. 2. COMPENSATION In consideration for the Services, Client shall pay Contractor the sum of $[Amount] upon completion of [Milestone/Project]. Payment shall be made within [Number] days of receipt of an invoice. 3. INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR STATUS Contractor is an independent contractor, not an employee of Client. Contractor is responsible for all taxes, including self-employment tax, social security, and income taxes. Contractor is not eligible for any employee benefits provided by Client. 4. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS Unless otherwise agreed in writing, all work product, including but not limited to code, models, documentation, and data preparation scripts created by Contractor in connection with the Services, shall be considered "work made for hire" and shall be the sole property of the Client. 5. CONFIDENTIALITY Contractor acknowledges that during the course of this Agreement, they may have access to confidential and proprietary information of the Client. Contractor agrees to maintain the strict confidentiality of such information and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent. 6. TERMINATION Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time upon [Number] days' written notice to the other party. In the event of termination, Contractor shall be paid for all Services performed up to the date of termination. 7. GOVERNING LAW This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of [State Name], without regard to its conflict of laws principles. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this

Summarise the following contract section. Return a JSON object with keys: parties, effective_date, key_obligations, termination_conditions, governing_law.

Contract text:
INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT This Independent Contractor Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of [Date], by and between: CLIENT: [Client Name], [Address] CONTRACTOR: [Contractor Name], [Address] 1. SERVICES: Contractor agrees to perform [Description of Services]. 2. COMPENSATION: Client shall pay Contractor $[Amount] for the Services. 3. STATUS: Contractor is an independent contractor, not an employee. 4. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY: All work product remains the property of the Client. 5. CONFIDENTIALITY: Contractor shall keep all Client information private. 6. TERMINATION: Either party may terminate with [Number] days' notice. 7. GOVERNING LAW: This Agreement is governed by the laws of [State]. SIGNED: Client: ____________________ Date: __________ Contractor: ________________ Date: __________
